name: sonarqube
description: SonarQube is the AI code quality and security verification platform used by millions of developers to catch bugs, vulnerabilities, and leaked secrets. This plugin enforces those standards in the agent coding loop: 7,500+ distinct issue types, secrets scanning, agentic analysis, and quality gates across 40+ languages.

interface.shortDescription: Enforce code quality and security as it's written
interface.longDescription: SonarQube is the AI code quality and security verification platform used by millions of developers to catch bugs, vulnerabilities, and leaked secrets. This plugin enforces those standards in the agent coding loop: 7,500+ distinct issue types, secrets scanning, agentic analysis, and quality gates across 40+ languages.
defaultPrompt: Help me fix the most severe SonarQube issues for this project
